title: Hong Kong Charges 7 People and 2 Companies Over Deadly Apartment Fire
summary_full: The 25 charges include manslaughter and conspiracy. They are the first to emerge from a monthslong investigation into a blaze that killed 168 people.
summary_public: The 25 charges include manslaughter and conspiracy. They are the first to emerge from a monthslong investigation into a blaze that killed 168 people.
